title: My Legacy
text:
My Legacy - SupportGoWhere
My Legacy
Share link
Plan, store and share your legal, healthcare and estate matters securely with people you trust.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Free
Referral not required
Collapse all sections
About this support

My Legacy is a trusted digital companion that makes planning easy and convenient.

It uses technology to make it seamless to document and share your plans, so that you and your loved ones can spend the time focusing on the things that matter: celebrating your relationships, achieving your life goals, and leaving a lasting legacy.

Who is this for?

Individuals aged 30 and above who are interested to find out how they can start their legacy planning.

What to expect?

Consolidated information on legacy planning and services like applying for a Lasting Power of Attorney, Advance Care Planning

You can also download a copy of a deceased's digital death certificate from My Legacy if it is still within 30 days from the date of issuance.

How to apply?

No application is needed

Find out more on how to start legacy planning

Information last updated on 23 Sep 2025
